title: Zaan Folkfest
review: Super cute folk festival in Wormerveer. Biertjes, cool music, good vibes, and even some bolfolk dancing with Sam in the park.
full_description: The ZaanFolk Foundation is organizing the ZaanFolk Festival for the 10th time on Saturday, July 4.  It begins at 1:00 PM in the Wilhelminapark on Wandelweg in Wormerveer. The park closes at 7:00 PM, and the remainder of the festival takes place in the evening at Café De Melterij, diagonally opposite the Wilhelminapark.
ai_summary: The ZaanFolk Foundation marks a decade of its folk festival with this milestone tenth edition in Wormerveer, held on Saturday, July 4. The day unfolds in two distinct settings: an afternoon open-air gathering at Wilhelminapark starting at 1:00 PM, followed by an evening continuation at Café De Melterij just across the way once the park closes at 7:00 PM. The split-venue format gives the day a natural shift in atmosphere, moving from a relaxed park setting into a more intimate café performance space.
